scenario_domain: planes para el fin de semana
opening_utterance: Este fin de semana yo soy en casa porque mi hermana es enferma.
notes: A2 making weekend plans. Confidently produces presente tense but consistently picks 'ser' where 'estar' belongs (location, temporary state, ongoing condition). Distinct from A1 ser/estar in that the learner is otherwise fluent — the recast must be subtle.
